report.name: PENPRN_DEC_INSTANCE1_AI_ETEAEP_DA

dataSource.name: Q_1
dataSource.select: SELECT COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_DOMAIN_TYPE, COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_NAME, PEN_PRODUCTS.PROCUCT_DESCRIPTION, PEN_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CODE, COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION.PENSION_IKA_INST_NAME, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PROTOCOL_NO||'-'||TO_CHAR( PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.APPL_DATE,'DD/MM/RRRR'), PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PROTOCOL_NO, REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID, DECODE(REG_INSURED.SEX, 'Α', 'του ασφαλισμένου ', 'Θ', 'της ασφαλισμένης ') DECODED_SEX, REG_INSURED.SURNAME||' '||REG_INSURED.NAME FULLNAME, REG_INSURED.FATHER_NAME, REG_INSURED.MOTHER_NAME, PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.INSTITUTION_CODE, REG_INSURED.amka_id, REG_INSURED.taxation_id, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PROTOCOL_NO, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR FROM REG_INSURED, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES, COM_ORG_BRANCHES, PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST, PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS, PEN_PRODUCTS, COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION WHERE PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE=:P_APPL_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_DOCUMENT_TYPE_APPL_CODE='00001' AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR=:P_APPL_YEAR AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID=PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.INSURED_ID AND PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST.QC_PER_PRODINST_CODE=:P_QC_PER_PRODINST AND PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE AND COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION.PENSION_IKA_INST_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.INSTITUTION_CODE AND PEN_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_CODE AND COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_CODE=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE;

dataItem.name: DECODED_SEX
dataItem.defaultLabel: Decode Reg Insured Sex Α Του Α

dataSource.name: Q_4
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE, COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_DESCR, MIN(TO_DATE(1||'/'||nvl(MONTH,12)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,4000))), MAX(TO_DATE(30||'/'||nvl(MONTH,1)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,1000))), SUM(PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_QUAL_FINAL) FROM PEN_INSURED_DAYS , COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES WHERE PEN_INSURED_DAYS.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.USE_FLG='1' AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CATEGORY='2' AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE=COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_TYPE GROUP BY PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE,COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_DESCR;

dataItem.name: MAX_TO_DATE_30_nvl_MONTH_1_nv2
dataItem.defaultLabel: Max To Date 30 Nvl Month 1 Nv2

dataDescriptor.expression: MAX ( TO_DATE ( 30 || '/' || nvl ( MONTH , 1 ) || '/' || nvl ( YEAR , 1000 ) ) )

dataItem.name: MIN_TO_DATE_1_nvl_MONTH_12_nv3
dataItem.defaultLabel: Min To Date 1 Nvl Month 12 Nv3

dataDescriptor.expression: MIN ( TO_DATE ( 1 || '/' || nvl ( MONTH , 12 ) || '/' || nvl ( YEAR , 4000 ) ) )

dataSource.name: Q_5
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE, PEN_RULES.CONDITION, PEN_QUERY_TYPES.CONCERN_DAYS_FLG FROM PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE, PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM, PEN_RULES, PEN_QUERY_TYPES, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS, PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS WHERE PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DECISION_YEAR=:P_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE='1' AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DECISION_YEAR_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE_CODE=PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.BEPD_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE_CODE AND PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QSUB_QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS.TYPE='0' AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE = PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_RULES.RULE_CODE = PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM.RULE_RULE_CODE AND PEN_RULES.QUERY_TYPE_CODE = PEN_QUERY_TYPES.QUERY_TYPE_CODE AND PEN_QUERY_TYPES.CONCERN_DAYS_FLG = 2

dataSource.name: Q_6
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE, PEN_RULES.CONDITION, PEN_QUERY_TYPES.CONCERN_DAYS_FLG FROM PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE, PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM, PEN_RULES, PEN_QUERY_TYPES, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS, PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS WHERE PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DECISION_YEAR=:P_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE='1' AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DECISION_YEAR_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE_CODE=PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.BEPD_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE_CODE AND PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QSUB_QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS.TYPE='0' AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE = PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_RULES.RULE_CODE = PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM.RULE_RULE_CODE AND PEN_RULES.QUERY_TYPE_CODE = PEN_QUERY_TYPES.QUERY_TYPE_CODE AND PEN_QUERY_TYPES.CONCERN_DAYS_FLG = 1

dataSource.name: Q_7
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_INDIRECT, PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE, REG_INSURED.SURNAME||' '||REG_INSURED.NAME, REG_INSURED.DATE_OF_BIRTH, PEN_DEPENDANT_TYPES.DEPENDENCY_NAME, REG_INSURED.AMKA_ID AMKA_WIFE, REG_INSURED.TAXATION_ID TAXATION_WIFE FROM REG_INSURED, PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS,PEN_DEPENDANT_TYPES WHERE PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR= :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DECISION_YEAR_SR=:p_dt_decision_year AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_DIRECT=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_INDIRECT=REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE!='00001' AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE=PEN_DEPENDANT_TYPES.DEPENDENCY_TYPE ORDER BY PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE

dataSource.name: Q_8
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE,PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_CODE AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR= :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=:p_dt_decision_year AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='0' ORDER BY PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE

dataSource.name: Q_9
Q_10
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE,PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_CODE AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=:P_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='1' ORDER BY PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE

dataSource.name: Q_17
dataSource.select:
SELECT value FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00070' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND
pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00113'

dataSource.name: Q_20
dataSource.select: SELECT com_pension_institutions.pension_inst_name FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance, com_pension_institutions WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00070' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00010' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=com_pension_institutions.PENSION_INST_CODE(+)

dataSource.name: Q_24
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_DEATH_REASON.REASON_DESCR FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance, PEN_DEATH_REASON WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00035' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00049' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=PEN_DEATH_REASON.REASON_CODE(+)

dataSource.name: Q_26
dataSource.select: SELECT value FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00028' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00013'

dataSource.name: Q_27
dataSource.select: SELECT value FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00028' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00014'

dataSource.name: Q_28
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_ACCOUNT.QUAL_PENSION_RIGHT_DATE, PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.PAYMENT_END_DATE, PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE, PEN_PRODUCTS.PROCUCT_DESCRIPTION, DECODE (PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.DEDUCT_FLG, NULL, 'ΠΛΗΡΗ', 'ΜΕΙΩΜΕΝΗ') FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, PEN_PRODUCTS, PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS, PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST, PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QCPRODINS_QC_PER_PRODINST_CODE=PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST.QC_PER_PRODINST_CODE AND PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE AND PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_CODE=PEN_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CODE AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID= PEN_ACCOUNT.INS_INSURED_ID AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR=PEN_ACCOUNT.DI_DT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=PEN_ACCOUNT.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DECISION_YEAR_SR=PEN_ACCOUNT.DI_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=PEN_ACCOUNT.DI_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE --AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO;

dataSource.name: Q_29
dataSource.select:
SELECT COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_DESCR, MIN(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(MONTH||'/'||YEAR),'mm/yyyy')) INSURANCE_FROM, MAX(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(MONTH||'/'||YEAR),'mm/yyyy')) INSURANCE_TO, SUM(PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_QUAL_FINAL) INSURANCE_DAYS FROM PEN_INSURED_DAYS , COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES WHERE PEN_INSURED_DAYS.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO= :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.Ins_Insured_Id= :P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE=COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_TYPE AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_QUAL_FINAL != 0 GROUP BY PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE, COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_DESCR ORDER BY 2,1;
/*SELECT distinct TO_DATE(CHAR_COL2,'DD/MM/YYYY') DATE_TO_ORD, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CHAR_COL1,'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'MM/YYYY') INSURANCE_FROM, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CHAR_COL2,'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'MM/YYYY') INSURANCE_TO, NUM_COL1 INSURANCE_DAYS, CHAR_COL3 TRANS_DESCR, CHAR_COL4 DESCRIPTION, CHAR_COL5 DESCRIPTION FROM PEN_WEBFORMS_RG WHERE 1=1 AND :P_SID IS NOT NULL AND CHAR_COL3 IS NOT NULL AND SID=:P_SID AND RG_NAME = 'RG_NAME1' ORDER BY 1 ; */ /*SELECT ' ' INSURANCE_FROM, ' ' INSURANCE_TO, 1 INSURANCE_DAYS, ' ' TRANS_DESCR, ' ' DESCRIPTION, ' 'DESCRIPTION2 FROM DUAL; */

dataSource.name: Q_30
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_ACCOUNT.QUAL_PENSION_RIGHT_DATE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO2

dataSource.name: Q_31
dataSource.select: SELECT TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE,PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_CODE AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR= :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=:p_dt_decision_year AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='0' ORDER BY TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE

dataSource.name: Q_32
dataSource.select: SELECT TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_CODE AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=:P_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='1' ORDER BY TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE

dataSource.name: Q_33
dataSource.select: SELECT ' 'SPRE_CODE, ' 'SPRE_DESCR, 1 INSURANCE_DAYS_SPRE_FINAL FROM DUAL;

dataSource.name: Q_34
dataSource.select: SELECT SUM(PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CALC_FINAL), MIN(TO_DATE(1||'/'||nvl(MONTH,12)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,4000))), LAST_DAY(MAX(TO_DATE(1||'/'||NVL(MONTH,1)||'/'||NVL(YEAR,1000)))) FROM PEN_INSURED_DAYS WHERE PEN_INSURED_DAYS.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO= :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INS_INSURED_ID= :P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.USE_FLG='1' AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CALC_FINAL IS NOT NULL AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CALC_FINAL!=0;

dataItem.name: MIN_TO_DATE_1_nvl_MONTH_12_nv6
dataItem.defaultLabel: Min To Date 1 Nvl Month 12 Nv6

dataDescriptor.expression: MIN ( TO_DATE ( 1 || '/' || nvl ( MONTH , 12 ) || '/' || nvl ( YEAR , 4000 ) ) )

dataItem.name: LAST_DAY_MAX_TO_DATE_1_NVL_MO1
dataItem.defaultLabel: Last Day Max To Date 1 Nvl Mo1

dataDescriptor.expression: LAST_DAY ( MAX ( TO_DATE ( 1 || '/' || NVL ( MONTH , 1 ) || '/' || NVL ( YEAR , 1000 ) ) ) )

dataSource.name: Q_35

dataSource.select:
/*SELECT PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS.PERCENTAGE FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance, PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code in ('00069','00159') AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00228' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS.SICKNESS_DEDUCTION_ID(+);*/
SELECT PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.PERCENTAGE FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance, PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code in ('01069','00159') AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00228' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.SICKNESS_DEDUCTION_ID(+) AND :P_ACC_START_DATE >=PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.EFFECTIVE_DATE ORDER BY PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.EFFECTIVE_DATE DESC;

dataSource.name: Q_18
dataSource.select:
/*SELECT PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS.PERCENTAGE FROM TMP_dec_fact_types_instance,PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS WHERE TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00159' AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00228' AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.FORM_ID=:P_FORM_ID AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS.SICKNESS_DEDUCTION_ID(+)*/
SELECT PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.PERCENTAGE FROM TMP_dec_fact_types_instance, PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW WHERE TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00159' AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00228' AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.FORM_ID=:P_FORM_ID AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.SICKNESS_DEDUCTION_ID(+) AND :P_ACC_START_DATE >=PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.EFFECTIVE_DATE ORDER BY PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.EFFECTIVE_DATE DESC;

dataSource.select: SELECT 1 FROM PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_QUALIFYING_TERM_PER_BE, PEN_BE_PER_PRODINST, PEN_BE_PER_QUAL_CAT, PEN_BUSSINESS_EVENTS WHERE PEN_BUSSINESS_EVENTS.STATE='0'--ΜΗ ΘΕΜΕΛΙΩΤΙΚΟ AND PEN_BUSSINESS_EVENTS.BUSSINESS_EVENT_GROUP='4'--ΑΝ ΠΡΟΚΕΙΤΑΙ ΓΙΑ ΠΡΟΣΑΥΞΗΣΗ Α.Α. AND PEN_BUSSINESS_EVENTS.REQUIRE_PENSION_FLAG='0'--ΔΕΝ ΧΡΕΙΑΖΕΤΑΙ ΝΑ ΠΑΙΡΝΕΙ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗ AND PEN_BE_PER_PRODINST.BUSS_EVENT_CODE=PEN_BUSSINESS_EVENTS.BUSS_EVENT_CODE AND PEN_BE_PER_QUAL_CAT.BE_PER_PRODINST_CODE=PEN_BE_PER_PRODINST.BE_PER_PRODINST_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_TERM_PER_BE.BE_PER_QUAL_CATEGORY_CODE=PEN_BE_PER_QUAL_CAT.BE_PER_QUAL_CATEGORY_CODE AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_PER_BE=PEN_QUALIFYING_TERM_PER_BE.QUALIF_TERM_PER_BE_CODE AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR= :p_dt_decision_year AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:p_insured_id AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.BE_TYPE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE_FLG ='1' AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR ='1' ;

dataSource.name: Q_62
dataSource.select: SELECT 1 DAYS, ' ' INSURANCE_FROM, ' ' INSURANCE_TO, ' ' DESCRIPTION FROM DUAL;

dataSource.name: Q_51
dataSource.select: SELECT A.VALUE, A.DEC_FACT_TYPE_CODE FROM PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE A WHERE A.title_code='00368' AND A.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND A.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND A.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND A.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND A.dec_fact_type_code IN ('00510','00511','00512','00513','00514') ORDER BY A.DEC_FACT_TYPE_CODE

dataSource.name: Q_52
dataSource.select: SELECT A.HEAVY_BONUS_ORG, A.HEAVY_BONUS_IND FROM PEN_ACCOUNT A WHERE A.ACCOUNT_NO= :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND A.USAGE_FLG='1'

dataSource.name: Q_54
dataSource.select: SELECT A.INSURANCE_CLASS, A.PERIOD_YEAR_FROM || '-' || A.PERIOD_YEAR_TO PERIOD, A.NOTICE_TOTAL_SALARY, A.NOTICE_TOTAL_DAYS, A.PERIOD_YEAR_TO FROM PEN_SUMMARIZATION_PER_INSURED A WHERE A.PROCESS_ID = :P_PROCESS_ID

dataItem.name: PERIOD
dataItem.defaultLabel: A Period Year From A Period Ye

dataSource.name: Q_55
dataSource.select: SELECT WORKING_INS_REDUCTION, WORK_INS_CHILD_INCR, DECODE(WORK_INS_SECTOR, 'Ι', ' ΣΤΟΝ ΙΔΙΩΤΙΚΟ ΤΟΜΕΑ','Δ','ΣΤΟ ΔΗΜΟΣΙΟ/ΕΥΡΥΤΕΡΟ ΔΗΜΟΣΙΟ ΤΟΜΕΑ','Α','ΜΕ ΑΥΤΟΑΠΑΣΧΟΛΗΣΗ',WORK_INS_SECTOR), DECODE(WORK_INS_SECTOR, 'Ι', ' 63 Ν.2676/99','Δ','8 Π. 14 Ν. 2592/98',WORK_INS_SECTOR), DECODE(WORK_INS_SECTOR, 'Ι', 'ΣΤΟ ΠΟΣΟ ΠΟΥ ΥΠΕΡΒΑΙΝΕΙ ΤΑ 733,68 ΕΥΡΩ','Δ','ΣΤΟ ΣΥΝΟΛΙΚΟ ΠΟΣΟ ΤΗΣ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ',WORK_INS_SECTOR), Work_Ins_Sector SECTOR, Excess_Amount, Initial_Amount, Final_Amount, Children_Num, LIMIT_AMOUNT_FOR_EXCESS FROM PEN_ACCOUNT_WORKING_INFO WHERE Account_No = :P_Acc_Account_No;

dataItem.name: DECODE_WORK_INS_SECTOR_Ι_ΣΤΟΝ_
dataItem.defaultLabel: Decode Work Ins Sector Ι Στον

dataDescriptor.expression: DECODE ( WORK_INS_SECTOR , 'Ι' , ' ΣΤΟΝ ΙΔΙΩΤΙΚΟ ΤΟΜΕΑ' , 'Δ' , 'ΣΤΟ ΔΗΜΟΣΙΟ/ΕΥΡΥΤΕΡΟ ΔΗΜΟΣΙΟ ΤΟΜΕΑ' , 'Α' , 'ΜΕ ΑΥΤΟΑΠΑΣΧΟΛΗΣΗ' , WORK_INS_SECTOR )

dataItem.name: DECODE_WORK_INS_SECTOR_Ι_ΣΤΟ_Π
dataItem.defaultLabel: Decode Work Ins Sector Ι Στο Π

dataDescriptor.expression: DECODE ( WORK_INS_SECTOR , 'Ι' , 'ΣΤΟ ΠΟΣΟ ΠΟΥ ΥΠΕΡΒΑΙΝΕΙ ΤΑ 733,68 ΕΥΡΩ' , 'Δ' , 'ΣΤΟ ΣΥΝΟΛΙΚΟ ΠΟΣΟ ΤΗΣ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ' , WORK_INS_SECTOR )

dataItem.name: DECODE_WORK_INS_SECTOR_Ι_63_Ν_
dataItem.defaultLabel: Decode Work Ins Sector Ι 63 Ν

dataDescriptor.expression: DECODE ( WORK_INS_SECTOR , 'Ι' , ' 63 Ν.2676/99' , 'Δ' , '8 Π. 14 Ν. 2592/98' , WORK_INS_SECTOR )

dataSource.name: Q_56
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_INDIRECT INDIRECT_ID, PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE, REG_INSURED.SURNAME, REG_INSURED.NAME FROM REG_INSURED, PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS WHERE PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR= :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DECISION_YEAR_SR=:p_dt_decision_year AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_DIRECT=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_INDIRECT=REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE='00003'

dataSource.name: Q_57
dataSource.select: select DEBT_ID, DEDUCTION_PENSION_FACTOR, DOSAGE_AMOUNT, TOTAL_DEDUCTION_AMMOUNT, b.descr, rownum num_debt from PEN_DEC_INSTANCE_DEBTS a, ppi_deduction_types b WHERE DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE= :p_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND DT_DECISION_YEAR= :p_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO and a.DEBT_ID=b.code(+) AND a.STATUS='1'

dataSource.name: Q_58
dataSource.select: SELECT AVERAGE_INCOME, to_char(MIN(TO_date(MONTH||'/'||YEAR,'MM/RRRR')),'mm/yyyy'), to_char(MAX(TO_date(MONTH||'/'||YEAR,'MM/RRRR')),'mm/yyyy'), sum(NVL(MONTH_INCOME,0)), TOTAL_YEARS, ((sum(NVL(MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED,0))*25) /sum(NVL(MONTH_DAYS,0))) INFLATED_2, ((sum(NVL(MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED,0)+NVL(RETRO_AMT_INFLATED,0))*25)/sum(NVL(MONTH_DAYS,0))) INFLATED_3, sum(NVL(MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED,0)+NVL(RETRO_AMT_INFLATED,0)) INFLATED_1, POSOSTO_ANAPL, ADAPODOTIKH_AMT, TOTAL_PERCENT_KSB, ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB, NVL(POSOSTO_ANAPL,0)+ NVL(ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB,0) , SUM(NVL(MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED,0)) FROM PEN_CALC_ADAPOD_RESULTS WHERE ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO GROUP by AVERAGE_INCOME, TOTAL_YEARS,POSOSTO_ANAPL, ADAPODOTIKH_AMT,TOTAL_PERCENT_KSB, ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB;

dataDescriptor.expression: ( ( sum ( NVL ( MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED , 0 ) + NVL ( RETRO_AMT_INFLATED , 0 ) ) * 25 ) / sum ( NVL ( MONTH_DAYS , 0 ) ) )
( ( sum ( NVL ( MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED , 0 ) ) * 25 ) / sum ( NVL ( MONTH_DAYS , 0 ) ) )

dataItem.name: to_char_MIN_TO_date_MONTH_YEAR
dataItem.defaultLabel: To Char Min To Date Month Year

dataItem.name: to_char_MAX_TO_date_MONTH_YEAR
dataItem.defaultLabel: To Char Max To Date Month Year

dataSource.name: Q_59
dataSource.select: SELECT INITIAL_NAT_PENSION_AMT, STAY_GREECE_YEARS, DENOM_OMOGENON, DECODE( DENOM_OMOGENON, 40, NULL, 'ΑΡΘ.73 Ν.4915/22)') OMOG_LAW, INSURANCE_YEARS, INS_YEARS_REDUCTION, STAY_GR_YEARS_REDUCTION, AGE_LIMIT_REDUCTION, FINAL_NAT_PENSION_AMT, DISABIL_PENSION_REDUCTION FROM PEN_CALC_NATIONAL_RESULTS WHERE ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO

dataSource.name: Q_60
dataSource.select: SELECT LABOR_ACCIDENT_FLG FROM PEN_CALC_NATIONAL_RESULTS WHERE ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO

dataSource.name: Q_61
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT 1 ORD, B.TEXT,B.DATE_FROM,B.DATE_TO,B.EE,B.MM,B.HH FROM PEN_EFKA_DAYS_HDR A, PEN_EFKA_DAYS_DLT B WHERE A.INSURED_ID = B.INSURED_ID AND A.INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND B.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE = :P_APPL_UNIT_CODE AND B.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR = :P_APPL_YEAR AND B.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO = :P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO AND TEXT NOT LIKE '%ΣΥΝΟΛ%' AND :p_application_efka_days = 1 UNION SELECT DISTINCT 2 ORD, B.TEXT,B.DATE_FROM,B.DATE_TO,B.EE,B.MM,B.HH FROM PEN_EFKA_DAYS_HDR A, PEN_EFKA_DAYS_DLT B WHERE A.INSURED_ID = B.INSURED_ID AND A.INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND B.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE = :P_APPL_UNIT_CODE AND B.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR = :P_APPL_YEAR AND B.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO = :P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO AND :p_application_efka_days = 1 AND TEXT LIKE '%ΣΥΝΟΛ%' UNION SELECT DISTINCT 1 ORD, B.TEXT,B.DATE_FROM,B.DATE_TO,B.EE,B.MM,B.HH FROM PEN_EFKA_DAYS_HDR A, PEN_EFKA_DAYS_DLT B WHERE A.INSURED_ID = B.INSURED_ID AND A.INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND B.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE IS NULL AND B.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR IS NULL AND B.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO IS NULL AND TEXT NOT LIKE '%ΣΥΝΟΛ%' AND :p_application_efka_days = 0 UNION SELECT DISTINCT 2 ORD, B.TEXT,B.DATE_FROM,B.DATE_TO,B.EE,B.MM,B.HH FROM PEN_EFKA_DAYS_HDR A, PEN_EFKA_DAYS_DLT B WHERE A.INSURED_ID = B.INSURED_ID AND A.INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND B.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE IS NULL AND B.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR IS NULL AND B.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO IS NULL AND :p_application_efka_days = 0 AND TEXT LIKE '%ΣΥΝΟΛ%' ORDER BY 1,3

dataSource.name: Q_63
dataSource.select: SELECT FROM_WORKING_DATE,TO_WORKING_DATE FROM PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS , COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES, COM_COVERS_PER_COVERAGES WHERE PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE=COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_TYPE and COM_COVERS_PER_COVERAGES.COVCOD_COVERAGE_CODE=PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.COVCOD_COVERAGE_CODE and COM_COVERS_PER_COVERAGES.CVR_COVER_CODE='ΚΣΙ' AND PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE IN ('810','820','830','840');

dataSource.name: Q_64
dataSource.select: -------------- TERM_CODE : '10148' - ΑΝΔΡΕΣ/ΓΥΝΑΙΚΕΣ ΓΟΝΕΑΣ ΑΝΑΠΗΡΟΥ ΤΕΚΝΟΥ,7500 ΗΕ / : '10147' - ΑΝΔΡΕΣ/ΓΥΝΑΙΚΕΣ ΣΥΖΥΓΟΣ ΑΝΑΠΗΡΟΥ,7500 ΗΕ select b.fact_type_descr info_descr, decode(a.value,'0','ΟΧΙ','1','ΝΑΙ',a.value) info_value from pen_dec_fact_types_instance a, pen_dec_fact_types b where a.di_document_type_dec_coce_sr = '1' and a.ins_insured_id = :p_insured_id and a.di_dec_incr_seq_no_sr = :p_dec_incr_sec_no_sr and a.di_decision_year_sr = :p_dt_decision_year and a.di_dec_unit_code_sr = :p_dt_dec_unit_code and a.dec_fact_type_code = b.dec_fact_type_code and a.title_code = '00387' and a.dec_fact_type_code in ('00201' , '00050' ) ---μονο αναπηρια ζητησε η Κουτρα να εμφανίζεται union all select b.fact_type_descr info_descr, decode(a.value,'0','ΟΧΙ','1','ΝΑΙ',a.value) info_value from pen_dec_fact_types_instance a, pen_dec_fact_types b where a.di_document_type_dec_coce_sr = '1' and a.ins_insured_id = :p_insured_id and a.di_dec_incr_seq_no_sr = :p_dec_incr_sec_no_sr and a.di_decision_year_sr = :p_dt_decision_year and a.di_dec_unit_code_sr = :p_dt_dec_unit_code and a.dec_fact_type_code = b.dec_fact_type_code and a.title_code = '00388' and a.dec_fact_type_code in ('00201' , '00050' ) ---μονο αναπηρια ζητησε η Κουτρα να εμφανίζεται union all select b.fact_type_descr info_descr, decode(a.value,'0','ΟΧΙ','1','ΝΑΙ',a.value) info_value from pen_dec_fact_types_instance a, pen_dec_fact_types b where a.di_document_type_dec_coce_sr = '1' and a.ins_insured_id = :p_insured_id and a.di_dec_incr_seq_no_sr = :p_dec_incr_sec_no_sr and a.di_decision_year_sr = :p_dt_decision_year and a.di_dec_unit_code_sr = :p_dt_dec_unit_code and a.dec_fact_type_code = b.dec_fact_type_code and a.title_code = '00390' and a.dec_fact_type_code in ('00201' , '00050' ) ---μονο αναπηρια ζητησε η Κουτρα να εμφανίζεται union all -------------- TERM_CODE : '10149' - ΑΝΔΡΕΣ/ΓΥΝΑΙΚΕΣ ΑΔΕΡΦΟΣ ΑΝΑΠΗΡΟΥ, 7500 ΗΕ select b.fact_type_descr info_descr, decode(a.value,'0','ΟΧΙ','1','ΝΑΙ',a.value) info_value from pen_dec_fact_types_instance a, pen_dec_fact_types b where a.di_document_type_dec_coce_sr = '1' and a.ins_insured_id = :p_insured_id and a.di_dec_incr_seq_no_sr = :p_dec_incr_sec_no_sr and a.di_decision_year_sr = :p_dt_decision_year and a.di_dec_unit_code_sr = :p_dt_dec_unit_code and a.dec_fact_type_code = b.dec_fact_type_code and a.title_code = '00392' and a.dec_fact_type_code in ('00201' , '00050' ) ---μονο αναπηρια ζητησε η Κουτρα να εμφανίζεται union all select b.fact_type_descr info_descr, decode(a.value,'0','ΟΧΙ','1','ΝΑΙ',a.value) info_value from pen_dec_fact_types_instance a, pen_dec_fact_types b where a.di_document_type_dec_coce_sr = '1' and a.ins_insured_id = :p_insured_id and a.di_dec_incr_seq_no_sr = :p_dec_incr_sec_no_sr and a.di_decision_year_sr = :p_dt_decision_year and a.di_dec_unit_code_sr = :p_dt_dec_unit_code and a.dec_fact_type_code = b.dec_fact_type_code and a.title_code = '00391' and a.dec_fact_type_code in ('00201' , '00050' ) ---μονο αναπηρια ζητησε η Κουτρα να εμφανίζεται

dataSource.name: Q_65
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE TRANS_TYPE_PREP_DAYS, COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_DESCR TRANS_DESCR_PREP_DAYS, MIN(decode(PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE ,'810',FROM_WORKING_DATE,'820',FROM_WORKING_DATE,'830',FROM_WORKING_DATE,'840',FROM_WORKING_DATE,TO_DATE(nvl(MONTH,12)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,4000),'MM/YYYY'))) MIN_PREP_DAYS, MAX(decode(PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE ,'810',LAST_DAY(TO_WORKING_DATE),'820',LAST_DAY(TO_WORKING_DATE),'830',LAST_DAY(TO_WORKING_DATE),'840',LAST_DAY(TO_WORKING_DATE),LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(nvl(MONTH,1)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,1000),'MM/YYYY')))) MAX_PREP_DAYS, SUM(nvl(NOTICE_INSURANCE_DAYS,0)+nvl(NOTICE_INS_DAYS_INCR,0)) SUM_PREP_DAYS FROM PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS , COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES, COM_COVERS_PER_COVERAGES WHERE PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INS_INSURED_ID =:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE=COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_TYPE AND COM_COVERS_PER_COVERAGES.COVCOD_COVERAGE_CODE=PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.COVCOD_COVERAGE_CODE AND COM_COVERS_PER_COVERAGES.CVR_COVER_CODE IN ('ΚΣΙ', 'ΚΣΝ') GROUP BY PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE, COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_DESCR;

dataItem.name: MIN_PREP_DAYS
dataItem.defaultLabel: Min Decode Pen Prepare Days I1

dataDescriptor.expression: MIN ( decode ( PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE , '810' , FROM_WORKING_DATE , '820' , FROM_WORKING_DATE , '830' , FROM_WORKING_DATE , '840' , FROM_WORKING_DATE , TO_DATE ( nvl ( MONTH , 12 ) || '/' || nvl ( YEAR , 4000 ) , 'MM/YYYY' ) ) )

dataItem.name: MAX_PREP_DAYS
dataItem.defaultLabel: Max Decode Pen Prepare Days I1

dataDescriptor.expression: MAX ( decode ( PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE , '810' , LAST_DAY ( TO_WORKING_DATE ) , '820' , LAST_DAY ( TO_WORKING_DATE ) , '830' , LAST_DAY ( TO_WORKING_DATE ) , '840' , LAST_DAY ( TO_WORKING_DATE ) , LAST_DAY ( TO_DATE ( nvl ( MONTH , 1 ) || '/' || nvl ( YEAR , 1000 ) , 'MM/YYYY' ) ) ) )

dataSource.name: Q_67
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT sum(NUM_COL1) SUM_INSURANCE_DAYS, DECODE(NVL(B.DAYS_30_FLAG,'0') ,0, 25, 30) CALC_DAYS, DECODE(NVL(B.DAYS_30_FLAG,'0') ,0, '( / 25 )', '( / 30 )') CALC_DAYS_PROMPT FROM PEN_WEBFORMS_RG A, PEN_TRANS_TYPES B WHERE 1=1 AND :P_SID IS NOT NULL AND CHAR_COL3 IS NOT NULL AND SID=:P_SID AND RG_NAME = 'RG_NAME1' AND ( ( B.TRANSACTION_DESCR = A.CHAR_COL3 ) OR ( B.TRANSACTION_TYPE = A.CHAR_COL7 ) ) group by NVL(B.DAYS_30_FLAG,'0') ;

dataSource.name: Q_66
dataSource.select: select 1 ord, 'ΗΜΕΡΟΜΗΝΙΑ ΓΕΝΝΗΣΗΣ' code, to_char(a.date_of_birth,'dd/mm/yyyy') value from reg_insured a where a.insured_id = :p_insured_id union all select 2 ord, 'ΗΜΕΡΟΜΗΝΙΑ ΠΡΟΣΛΗΨΗΣ ΣΤΗΝ ΕΕ./ΔΙΕΘΝΗ ΟΡΓ' code, (select a.value from pen_dec_fact_types_instance a where a.di_document_type_dec_coce_sr = '1' and a.status = '1' and a.ins_insured_id = :p_insured_id and a.di_dec_incr_seq_no_sr = :p_dec_incr_sec_no_sr and a.di_decision_year_sr = :p_dt_decision_year and a.di_dec_unit_code_sr = :p_dt_dec_unit_code and a.title_code = '01825' and a.dec_fact_type_code = '01835') value from dual union all select 3 ord, 'ΗΜΕΡΟΜΗΝΙΑ ΥΠΟΒΟΛΗΣ ΑΙΤΗΣΗΣ ΣΤΗΝ Ε.Ε./ΔΙΕΘΝΗ ΟΡΓ' code, (select a.value from pen_dec_fact_types_instance a where a.di_document_type_dec_coce_sr = '1' and a.status = '1' and a.ins_insured_id = :p_insured_id and a.di_dec_incr_seq_no_sr = :p_dec_incr_sec_no_sr and a.di_decision_year_sr = :p_dt_decision_year and a.di_dec_unit_code_sr = :p_dt_dec_unit_code and a.title_code = '01825' and a.dec_fact_type_code = '01836') value from dual union all select 3 ord, 'ΗΜΕΡΟΜΗΝΙΑ ΥΠΟΒΟΛΗΣ ΑΙΤΗΣΗΣ ΣΤΗΝ ΕΛΛΑΔΑ' code, (select a.value from pen_dec_fact_types_instance a where a.di_document_type_dec_coce_sr = '1' and a.status = '1' and a.ins_insured_id = :p_insured_id and a.di_dec_incr_seq_no_sr = :p_dec_incr_sec_no_sr and a.di_decision_year_sr = :p_dt_decision_year and a.di_dec_unit_code_sr = :p_dt_dec_unit_code and a.title_code = '01825' and a.dec_fact_type_code = '01869') value from dual union all select 4 ord, 'ΗΜΕΡΟΜΗΝΙΑ ΠΕΡΙΕΛΕΥΣΗΣ ΤΗΣ ΑΙΤΗΣΗΣ ΣΤΟΝ e-ΕΦΚΑ' code, (select a.value from pen_dec_fact_types_instance a where a.di_document_type_dec_coce_sr = '1' and a.status = '1' and a.ins_insured_id = :p_insured_id and a.di_dec_incr_seq_no_sr = :p_dec_incr_sec_no_sr and a.di_decision_year_sr = :p_dt_decision_year and a.di_dec_unit_code_sr = :p_dt_dec_unit_code and a.title_code = '01825' and dataSource.name: Q_69
dataSource.select:
select distinct round(a.average_income,2) synt_misthos, round(a.average_income *0.45 * 12/100,2) synt_misthos_045_12, round(a.average_income *0.45 * 12 * a.total_years/100,2) synt_misthos_045_12_yrs, round(a.average_income *0.06 * 12,2) synt_misthos_006_12, round(a.average_income *0.06 * 12 * A.TOTAL_YEARS,2) synt_misthos_006_12_YRS, round(a.total_years,2) eth_asfalisis, 0 v_perc_ksb, round(a.average_income * a.total_years * 0.45/100,2) amount_a, 0 incr_amount from pen_calc_adapod_results_eteaep a where a.ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO and nvl(a.v_percent_ksb,0) = 0 and nvl(a.average_income,0) <> 0 AND YEAR <= 2014 -- CHRYS 10/10/2023 union all select distinct round(a.average_income,2) synt_misthos, round(a.average_income *0.45 * 12/100,2) synt_misthos_045_12, round(a.average_income *0.45 * 12 * a.total_years/100,2) synt_misthos_045_12_yrs, round(a.average_income *0.06 * 12/100,2) synt_misthos_006_12, round(a.average_income *0.06 * 12 * A.TOTAL_YEARS/100,2) synt_misthos_006_12_YRS, round(a.total_years,2) eth_asfalisis, a.v_percent_ksb v_perc_ksb, 0 amount_a, round(a.average_income * a.total_years * a.v_percent_ksb * 0.075/100,2) incr_amount from pen_calc_adapod_results_eteaep a where a.ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO and nvl(a.v_percent_ksb,0) <> 0 and nvl(a.average_income,0) <> 0 AND YEAR <= 2014 -- CHRYS 10/10/2023 order by 3
/*select distinct round(a.average_income,2) synt_misthos, round(a.total_years,2) eth_asfalisis, 0 v_perc_ksb, round(a.average_income * a.total_years * 0.45/100,2) amount_a, 0 incr_amount from pen_calc_adapod_results_eteaep a where a.ins_insured_id = :P_INSURED_ID and nvl(a.v_percent_ksb,0) = 0 and nvl(a.average_income,0) <> 0 union all select distinct round(a.average_income,2) synt_misthos, round(a.total_years,2) eth_asfalisis, a.v_percent_ksb v_perc_ksb, 0 amount_a, round(a.average_income * a.total_years * a.v_percent_ksb * 0.075/100,2) incr_amount from pen_calc_adapod_results_eteaep a where a.ins_insured_id = :P_INSURED_ID and nvl(a.v_percent_ksb,0) <> 0 and nvl(a.average_income,0) <> 0 order by 3*/

all select 6 ord, 'ΠΡΟΒΛΕΠΟΜΕΝΗ ΗΛΙΚΙΑ ΘΕΜΕΛΙΩΣΗΣ ΣΥΝΤ/ΚΟΥ ΔΙΚ/ΟΣ'||chr(10)||'ΑΠΟ ΤΟΝ e-ΕΦΚΑ' code, (select a.value from pen_dec_fact_types_instance a where a.di_document_type_dec_coce_sr = '1' and a.status = '1' and a.ins_insured_id = :p_insured_id and a.di_dec_incr_seq_no_sr = :p_dec_incr_sec_no_sr and a.di_decision_year_sr = :p_dt_decision_year and a.di_dec_unit_code_sr = :p_dt_dec_unit_code and a.title_code = '01865' and a.dec_fact_type_code = '01844') value from dual union all select 7 ord, 'ΠΡΟΒΛΕΠΟΜΕΝΗ ΗΜΕΡΟΜΗΝΙΑ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΙΟΔΟΤΗΣΗΣ' code, (select a.value from pen_dec_fact_types_instance a where a.di_document_type_dec_coce_sr = '1' and a.status = '1' and a.ins_insured_id = :p_insured_id and a.di_dec_incr_seq_no_sr = :p_dec_incr_sec_no_sr and a.di_decision_year_sr = :p_dt_decision_year and a.di_dec_unit_code_sr = :p_dt_dec_unit_code and a.title_code = '01865' and a.dec_fact_type_code = '01845') value from dual /* CHRYS 3/3/2023 TO 01846 EINAI ALLO PRAGMA union all select 8 ord, 'ΗΛΙΚΙΑ ΚΑΤΑ ΤΗΝ ΑΙΤΗΣΗ' code, (select a.value from pen_dec_fact_types_instance a where a.di_document_type_dec_coce_sr = '1' and a.status = '1' and a.ins_insured_id = :p_insured_id and a.di_dec_incr_seq_no_sr = :p_dec_incr_sec_no_sr and a.di_decision_year_sr = :p_dt_decision_year and a.di_dec_unit_code_sr = :p_dt_dec_unit_code and a.title_code = '01825' and a.dec_fact_type_code = '01846') value from dual END CHRYS 3/3/2023 */ union all select 9 ord, 'ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΗ ΣΤΗΝ ΕΕ./Δ.Ο. ΑΠΟ' code, (select a.value from pen_dec_fact_types_instance a where a.di_document_type_dec_coce_sr = '1' and a.status = '1' and a.ins_insured_id = :p_insured_id and a.di_dec_incr_seq_no_sr = :p_dec_incr_sec_no_sr and a.di_decision_year_sr = :p_dt_decision_year and a.di_dec_unit_code_sr = :p_dt_dec_unit_code and a.title_code = '01865' and a.dec_fact_type_code = '01867') value from dual union all select 10 ord, 'ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΗ ΣΤΗΝ ΕΕ./Δ.Ο. ΕΩΣ' code, (select a.value from pen_dec_fact_types_instance a where a.di_document_type_dec_coce_sr = '1' and a.status = '1' and a.ins_insured_id = :p_insured_id and a.di_dec_incr_seq_no_sr = :p_dec_incr_sec_no_sr and a.di_decision_year_sr = :p_dt_decision_year and a.di_dec_unit_code_sr = :p_dt_dec_unit_code and a.title_code = '01865' and a.dec_fact_type_code = '01868') value from dual union all select 11 ord, 'ΠΛΑΣΜΑΤΙΚΟ ΕΤΟΣ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΙΟΔΟΤΗΣΗΣ' code, (select a.value from pen_dec_fact_types_instance a where a.di_document_type_dec_coce_sr = '1' and a.status = '1' and a.ins_insured_id = :p_insured_id and a.di_dec_incr_seq_no_sr = :p_dec_incr_sec_no_sr and a.di_decision_year_sr = :p_dt_decision_year and a.di_dec_unit_code_sr = :p_dt_dec_unit_code and a.title_code = '01865' and a.dec_fact_type_code = '01840') value from dual union all select 12 ord, 'ΠΡΟΒΛΕΠΟΜΕΝΗ ΗΛΙΚΙΑ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΙΟΔΟΤΗΣΗΣ' code, (select a.value from pen_dec_fact_types_instance a where a.di_document_type_dec_coce_sr = '1' and a.status = '1' and a.ins_insured_id = :p_insured_id and a.di_dec_incr_seq_no_sr = :p_dec_incr_sec_no_sr and a.di_decision_year_sr = :p_dt_decision_year and a.di_dec_unit_code_sr = :p_dt_dec_unit_code and a.title_code = '01865' and a.dec_fact_type_code = '01841') value from dual /* υπολογιζεται οποτε δεν ειναι ειδικη πληροφορια (select a.value from pen_dec_fact_types_instance a where a.di_document_type_dec_coce_sr = '1' and a.status = '1' and a.ins_insured_id = :p_insured_id and a.di_dec_incr_seq_no_sr = :p_dec_incr_sec_no_sr and a.di_decision_year_sr = :p_dt_decision_year and a.di_dec_unit_code_sr = :p_dt_dec_unit_code and a.title_code = '01825' and a.dec_fact_type_code = '01837') value*/ union all select 13 ord, 'ΗΛΙΚΙΑ ΚΑΤΑ ΤΗΝ ΑΙΤΗΣΗ' code, to_char(APPLICATION_AGE) value from PEN_ACC_ANALOGIST_ISODYNAMO where ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO union all select 15 ord, 'ΣΥΝΤΑΞΙΜΟΣ ΜΙΣΘΟΣ ΣΤΗΝ Ε.Ε./Δ.Ο' code, (select a.value from pen_dec_fact_types_instance a where a.di_document_type_dec_coce_sr = '1' and a.status = '1' and a.ins_insured_id = :p_insured_id and a.di_dec_incr_seq_no_sr = :p_dec_incr_sec_no_sr and a.di_decision_year_sr = :p_dt_decision_year and a.di_dec_unit_code_sr = :p_dt_dec_unit_code and a.title_code = '01865' and a.dec_fact_type_code = '01862') value from dual union all select 16 ord, 'ΣΥΝΤΑΞΙΜΟΣ ΜΙΣΘΟΣ ΥΠΑΛΛΗΛΟΥ ΕΛΛΗΝΙΚΟΥ ΔΗΜΟΣΙΟΥ' code, (select a.value from pen_dec_fact_types_instance a where a.di_document_type_dec_coce_sr = '1' and a.status = '1' and a.ins_insured_id = :p_insured_id and a.di_dec_incr_seq_no_sr = :p_dec_incr_sec_no_sr and a.di_decision_year_sr = :p_dt_decision_year and a.di_dec_unit_code_sr = :p_dt_dec_unit_code and a.title_code = '01865' and a.dec_fact_type_code = '01871') value from dual order by 1 ;

dataSource.name: Q_68
dataSource.select: SELECT A.INSTITUTION_CODE INST_CODE_0075_DA, B.PENSION_IKA_INST_NAME INST_NAME_0075_DA, TO_CHAR(MIN(TO_DATE(MONTH||'/'||YEAR,'MM/RRRR')),'mm/yyyy') MIN_DATE_0075_DA, TO_CHAR(MAX(TO_DATE(MONTH||'/'||YEAR,'MM/RRRR')),'mm/yyyy') MAX_DATE_0075_DA, COUNT(DISTINCT MONTH||'/'||YEAR) TOTAL_MM_0075_DA, TOTAL_YEARS_0075, -- CHRYS 15/7/2022 AVERAGE_INCOME SYNTAXIMES_APODX_0075_DA, TOTAL_PERCENT_KSB TOTAL_PERC_KSB_0075_DA, ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB ADAPOD_PER_KSB_0075_DA, ADAPODOTIKH_AMT ADAPOD_AMNT_0075_DA FROM PEN_CALC_0075_RES_ETEAEP_DA A, COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION B WHERE 1=1-- AYTOT_DA_FLG = '2' AND A.ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND A.INSTITUTION_CODE = B.PENSION_IKA_INST_CODE GROUP BY ADAPODOTIKH_AMT, AVERAGE_INCOME , TOTAL_PERCENT_KSB, ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB, A.INSTITUTION_CODE, B.PENSION_IKA_INST_NAME, TOTAL_YEARS_0075 -- CHRYS 15/7/2022

dataSource.name: Q_72
dataSource.select: SELECT T.LOGO FROM PEN_REPORTS_EFKA_LOGO T WHERE T.STATUS = '1'

textSegment.string: 1. Τις διατάξεις του ν.4387/2016(ΦΕΚ 85/τ.Α'/12-05-2016) "Ενιαίο Σύστημα Κοινωνικής Ασφάλισης - Μεταρρύθμιση
ασφαλιστικού-συνταξιοδοτικού συστήματος - Ρυθμίσεις φορολογίας εισοδήματος και τυχερών παιγνίων και άλλες
διατάξεις" όπως τροποποιήθηκαν μεταγενέστερα και ισχύουν.
2. Τις διατάξεις του π.δ.8/23-01-2019(ΦΕΚ 8/τ.Α'/23-01-2019) όπως τροποποιήθηκαν μεταγενέστερα και ισχύουν.
3. Τις διατάξεις του άρθρου 11 (2) και (3) του Παραρτήματος VIII του Κανονισμού (ΕΟΚ) αριθ. 31 και Κανονισμού
(ΕΥΡΑΤΟΜ) αριθ. 11 περί καθορισμού του κανονισμού υπηρεσιακής καταστάσεως των υπαλλήλων και του
καθεστώτος που εφαρμόζεται επί του λοιπού προσωπικού της Ευρωπαϊκής Οικονομικής Κοινότητος και της
Ευρωπαϊκής Κοινότητος Ατομικής Ενεργείας και τις αντίστοιχες διατάξεις κανονισμών των συντονισμένων Διεθνών
Οργανισμών που ρυθμίζουν την υπηρεσιακή κατάσταση των υπαλλήλων.
4. Τα άρθρα 139 έως 145 του ν.4808/2021 (ΦΕΚ 101/τ.Α'/19-06-2021) "Για την Προστασία της Εργασίας - Σύσταση
Ανεξάρτητης Αρχής "Επιθεώρηση Εργασίας" - Κύρωση της Σύμβασης 190 της Διεθνούς Οργάνωσης Εργασίας για
την εξάλειψη της βίας και παρενόχλησης στον κόσμο της εργασίας - Κύρωση της Σύμβασης 187 της Διεθνούς
Οργάνωσης Εργασίας για τo Πλαίσιο Προώθησης της Ασφάλειας και της Υγείας στην Εργασία - Ενσωμάτωση της
Οδηγίας (ΕΕ) 2019/1158 του Ευρωπαϊκού Κοινοβουλίου και του Συμβουλίου της 20ής Ιουνίου 2019 για την ισορροπία
μεταξύ της επαγγελματικής και της ιδιωτικής ζωής, άλλες διατάξεις του Υπουργείου Εργασίας και Κοινωνικών
5. Την υπ΄αρίθμ. Φ.60000/61782/12004/09-09-2021 (ΦΕΚ Β' 4149/2021) Απόφαση Υφυπουργού Εργασίας "Μεταφορά
αναλογιστικού ισοδυνάμου συνταξιοδοτικών δικαιωμάτων του ν. 4808/2021 (Α' 101). "
6. Το άρθρο 2 της υπ' αρ. 17537/989/06-05-2020 (B' 1887) απόφασης του Υπουργού Εργασίας και Κοινωνικών Υποθέσεων
"Καθορισμός των τεχνικών παραμέτρων σχετικά με τις παροχές του Κλάδου Επικουρικής Ασφάλισηςη του e-ΕΦΚΑ"
Ο/Η Προϊσταμενος/η Διεύθυνσης του e-ΕΦΚΑ, αρμόδιος να κρίνει την με αριθμό πρωτοκόλλου &PROTOCOL_DETAILS
αίτηση για την μεταφορά Αναλογιστικού Ισοδύναμου των συνταξιοδοτικών δικαιωμάτων κλάδου επικουρικής
σύστημα του/της ασφαλισμένου με τα κάτωθι στοιχεία:
Έχοντας υπόψη τα στοιχεία του φακέλου από τα οποία προκύπτουν τα εξής:
ΗΜΕΡΟΜΗΝΙΑ ΥΠΟΒΟΛΗΣ ΑΙΤΗΣΗΣ ΣΤΗΝ Ε.Ε./ΔΙΕΘΝΗ ΟΡΓ.
ΗΜΕΡΟΜΗΝΙΑ ΠΕΡΙΕΛΕΥΣΗΣ ΤΗΣ ΑΙΤΗΣΗΣ ΣΤΟΝ e-ΕΦΚΑ
ΑΝΑΛΥΣΗ ΠΟΣΟΥ Α ( ΧΡΟΝΟΣ ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΗΣ ΕΩΣ 31/12/2014 )
ΑΝΑΛΥΣΗ ΠΟΣΟΥ Β ( ΧΡΟΝΟΣ ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΗΣ ΑΠΟ 01/01/2015 ΚΑΙ ΜΕΤΑ )
ΑΝΑΛΥΣΗ ΥΠΟΛΟΓΙΣΜΟΥ ΠΟΣΟΥ ΑΝΑΛΟΓΙΣΤΙΚΟΥ ΙΣΟΔΥΝΑΜΟΥ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΙΟΔΟΤΙΚΩΝ ΔΙΚΑΙΩΜΑΤΩΝ ΚΛΑΔΟΥ ΕΠΙΚΟΥΡΙΚΗΣ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ
ΣΥΝΤΕΛΕΣΤΗΣ ΑΝΑΛΟΓΙΣΤΙΚΟΥ ΙΣΟΔΥΝΑΜΟΥ ΓΙΑ ΤΟ ΤΜΗΜΑ ΤΟΥ ΠΟΣΟΥ Α
ΣΥΝΤΕΛΕΣΤΗΣ ΑΝΑΛΟΓΙΣΤΙΚΟΥ ΙΣΟΔΥΝΑΜΟΥ ΓΙΑ ΤΟ ΤΜΗΜΑ ΤΟΥ ΠΟΣΟΥ Β
Το ποσό του Αναλογιστικού Ισοδύναμου συνταξιοδοτικών δικαιωμάτων κλάδου επικουρικής
βάσει των διατάξεων των άρθρ. 139-140 & 142-145 του Ν.4808/2021 για χρόνο ασφάλισης
Ο/Η ΕΙΣΗΓΗΤΗΣ/ΤΡΙΑ Ο/Η ΠΡΟΪΣΤΑΜΕΝΟΣ/Η Ο/Η ΠΡΟΪΣΤΑΜΕΝΟΣ/Η
Τμήμα Αναλογιστικού Ισοδύναμου και Διεθνών Οργανισμών
Ο ασφαλισμένος έχει δικαίωμα, μέσα σε 60 ημέρες απο την ημερομηνία παραλαβής του,
να ασκήσει ένσταση στο Τμήμα Ενστάσεων και Προσφυγών της
Διεύθυνσης ΕΦΚΑ - Γενικής Διεύθυνσης Συντάξεων Δημοσίου Τομέα, Κάνιγγος 29, Αθήνα.

function CF_TROPOPIITIKI_DOCFormula return Char is CURSOR C1 IS Select Decode(B.document_code,'006','ΤΡΟΠΟΠΟΙΗΣΗΣ' ,'301','ΑΝΑΘΕΩΡΗΣΗΣ' ,'003','ΜΕΤΑΤΡΟΠΗΣ ΑΝΑΠ. ΣΕ ' ,'002','ΜΕΤΑΤΡΟΠΗΣ ΓΗΡ. ΣΕ ' ,B.document_name ) DOCUMENT_NAME, A.Document_Code From Wrk_In_Out A, WRK_DOCUMENTS B Where A.Protocol_Orgbra_Code = :PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE And A.Protocol_Year = :PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR And A.Protocol_No = :P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO And Nvl(A.Receive_Appl_Flg,'0') = '1' And A.Type_Flg = '1' And A.Status = '1' And A.Document_Code = B.Document_Code ;
begin OPEN C1; FETCH C1 INTO :CP_DOC_TROP, :CP_DOC_TROP_CODE; CLOSE C1; RETURN :CP_DOC_TROP_CODE; end;

function.textSource:
function CF_SUM_XRONOI return Char is CURSOR C1 IS SELECT MIN(MIN_DATE) MIN_DATE, MAX(MAX_DATE) MAX_DATE, SUM(SUM_YY) SUM_YY, SUM(SUM_MM) SUM_MM, SUM(SUM_DD) SUM_DD FROM ( SELECT DATE_FROM MIN_DATE, DATE_TO MAX_DATE, EE SUM_YY, MM SUM_MM, HH SUM_DD FROM PEN_EFKA_DAYS_HDR A, PEN_EFKA_DAYS_DLT B WHERE A.INSURED_ID = B.INSURED_ID AND A.INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND (( B.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE = :P_APPL_UNIT_CODE AND A.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE = B.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE) or (B.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE IS NULL AND 1=1)) AND (( B.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR = :P_APPL_YEAR AND A.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR = B.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR ) or (B.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR IS NULL AND 1=1)) AND (( B.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO = :P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO AND A.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO = B.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO ) or (B.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO IS NULL AND 1=1)) AND :p_application_efka_days = 1 AND TEXT NOT LIKE '%ΣΥΝ%' );
begin OPEN C1; FETCH C1 INTO :CP_MIN_DATE, :CP_MAX_DATE, :CP_SUM_YY, :CP_SUM_MM, :CP_SUM_DD; CLOSE C1; RETURN :CP_SUM_DD; EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN RETURN NULL; end;
